title: NONOS publisher identity certificate
description: JSON view of the binary NONOS identity certificate consumed by src/security/nonos_id_cert. The kernel decoder is the source of truth; this document mirrors the wire layout for host tooling. The cert binds a publisher's signing keys (hybrid Ed25519 + ML-DSA-65) to a namespace glob set and a capability ceiling, and is itself signed by the baked NONOS trust anchor policy (src/security/nonos_trust_anchor, .keys/nonos_trust_anchor_*.pub) under the production policy at src/security/nonos_id_cert/policy.rs (RequireAll on Ed25519 + ML-DSA-65).

cert_serial.description: Monotonic serial assigned by the trust anchor at issuance.

nonos_id.description: 32-byte stable publisher identity (BLAKE3 derivation; see src/security/nonos_id_cert/derive.rs).

items.description: Glob pattern over capsule app_namespace. The cert authorises this publisher to sign capsules whose namespace matches any glob in the set.

allowed_caps_ceiling.description: Hex-encoded u64 mask. The kernel admits a capsule's required_caps only if (required_caps & ~allowed_caps_ceiling) == 0.

metadata.description: UTF-8 publisher metadata, length-prefixed in the binary form.

valid_from_ms.description: Validity window start, Unix epoch milliseconds. The kernel verifier checks the window when a wall clock is available; see src/security/nonos_id_cert/verify/checks.rs.

valid_until_ms.description: Validity window end, Unix epoch milliseconds. Must be greater than valid_from_ms.

trust_anchor_epoch.description: Trust anchor epoch at issuance. Used by the kernel to reject certs from a revoked anchor generation.

publisher_keys.description: Publisher pubkeys (up to MAX_KEYS_PER_ALG = 2 per algorithm).

key_id.description: 16-byte stable key id (BLAKE3 of the pubkey bytes, truncated).

pubkey.description: Hex-encoded pubkey bytes. Length depends on algorithm: Ed25519 = 32 bytes, ML-DSA-65 = 1952 bytes, ML-DSA-44 = 1312 bytes, ML-DSA-87 = 2592 bytes.

trust_anchor_signatures.description: Hybrid signature set by the trust anchor. NONOS_PRODUCTION_POLICY requires both Ed25519 and ML-DSA-65 (RequireAll).

sig.description: Hex-encoded signature bytes over the canonical signed region (everything before the trust_anchor_signatures array).
